name: Credentials from Password Stores
description: Detects access to browser or system password stores for credential theft
query:
// Detect password store access
// Trigger on known credential extraction tools
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(lazagne|mimikatz.*vault|security\s+find-generic-password|credential.*manager|vaultcmd|Invoke-CredentialInjection|cmdkey\s+/list)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
